goal: Ship v8.6 Provider Execution Approval Bridge.
risk: AOF treats provider approval metadata as permission for unsafe external execution.
loss_boundary: No v8.6 release claim unless provider execution approval is bounded, auditable, and explicitly not production execution safety.
acceptance_gates: provider-execution-approval-audit fails missing human approval evidence
release-state-audit gates v8.6 on provider execution approval audit
evidence_plan: approval bridge record, approval audit, Mission Control projection, focused tests, release-state audit, Council review
stop_conditions: stop if preflight approval implies production execution safety
stop if external write can pass without human approval evidence
